name: womens-health-journal-companion-ai
description: AI-powered journaling companion for supportive, non-diagnostic women's health trend awareness.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @whjc/shared && npm run build -w @whjc/api && npm run build -w @whjc/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @whjc/api && npm run lint -w @whjc/web
